<!--
Title of this PR MUST follow the commit convention: <type>(<scope>): <subject>.
See docs/workflow/01-git.md section 2 for the full format.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 bullets. What is changing at the product / API level. No implementation details. -->

-

## Why

<!-- Motivation: problem, linked issue, ADR reference. 1–3 sentences. -->



## Changes

<!-- Implementation details worth the reviewer's attention: technical decisions, trade-offs, considered alternatives. Do not restate the diff — the reviewer will read the code. -->



## Test plan

<!-- At least one item. An empty test plan blocks merge (see docs/workflow/02-pull-requests.md section 3). -->

- [ ]
- [ ] Unit / integration tests added or updated
- [ ] Manual smoke test passed

## Screenshots / Recordings

<!-- For UI changes only. Before / after. For backend PRs — remove this section. -->



## Related

<!-- Link issues and ADRs. Use "Closes #N" to auto-close on merge. -->

-
